authShell.heroBody: A calm and reliable entry point for your account, security, and workspace access.
authShell.valueAccess: Platform access, profile, and security settings are managed through your Norge360 identity.
authShell.valueExperience: The sign-in experience stays fast and clear across desktop and mobile.

compactShell.footerLegal: By continuing, you agree to <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

confirmEmail.subtitle: Your confirmation link is being checked.
confirmEmail.title: Confirm your email

confirmEmailChange.subtitle: Your new email is verified with token and current session is cleared.
confirmEmailChange.title: Confirm email change

forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address. If an account exists, reset instructions will be sent.
forgotPassword.title: Reset your password

form.success: If an account exists, a password reset link will be sent.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your account securely.
login.title: Sign in to Norge360

form.recoveryCodePlaceholder: Use if MFA code is unavailable
form.fallbackError: Sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.

logout.subtitle: Your session is being closed securely.
logout.title: Secure logout

panel.done: Session closed. Redirecting to login page.

form.accepted: Registration received. If email confirmation is required, check your inbox.

form.success: If an account exists, confirmation email will be resent.

resetPassword.subtitle: Use the link from your email to update your password.
resetPassword.title: Update password

form.missingToken: Reset password link is missing or invalid.
form.success: Your password has been updated. You can sign in with your new password.

confirmEmailPanel.invalidLink: Email confirmation link is missing or invalid. Please reopen the link from your email.
confirmEmailPanel.success: Your email has been confirmed. You can now sign in.
confirmEmailPanel.fallbackError: Email confirmation failed. Please try again.

confirmEmailChangePanel.invalidLink: Email change link is missing or invalid. Please reopen the link from your email.
confirmEmailChangePanel.success: Your email has been updated. For security reasons, please sign in again.
confirmEmailChangePanel.fallbackError: Email change confirmation failed. Please try again.

errors.account_locked: Your account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
errors.auth_body_too_large: Request is too large. Please review the form.
errors.auth_rate_limit_exceeded: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.cookie_origin_validation_failed: Security verification failed. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.duplicate_email: An account already exists with this email.
errors.email_confirmation_required: You need to verify your email before continuing.
errors.email_unavailable: This email address is not available.
errors.invalid_email_change_token: Email change link is invalid or expired.
errors.invalid_email_confirmation_token: Email confirmation link is invalid or expired.
errors.invalid_password_reset_token: Password reset link is invalid or expired.
errors.mfa_required: A two-factor authentication code is required to continue.
errors.registration_conflict: Registration could not be completed. Please review your information and try again.
errors.validation: Some form fields are invalid. Please check highlighted fields.
errors.unauthorized: Session could not be verified. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.server: The operation could not be completed right now. Please try again shortly.
errors.default: The operation could not be completed. Please review your information and try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 12 characters long.
validation.passwordMax: Password can be at most 128 characters long.
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must include a lowercase letter.
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must include an uppercase letter.
validation.passwordSymbol: Password must include a special character.
validation.passwordVariety: Password must include at least 4 different characters.
validation.userNameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters long.
validation.userNameMax: Username can be at most 64 characters long.
